analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet praises China-ROK cooperation during COVID-19 as an excellent example of international cooperation, conveyed via a meeting with the ROK ambassador. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no mention of the West or criticism. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; it highlights China's cooperative stance and mutual assistance with South Korea against COVID-19, exemplifying constructive international cooperation. CH3 (epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestic focus) – Not addressed; the focus is international cooperation, not China’s domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not discussed; no claims about domestic development or leadership success. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
